assertions.description: The bus_analysis section reports empty lists for i2c, spi, uart, and can. The STM32F103C8T6 has USB FS capability and the source schematic contains net labels USB_D+ and USB_D-. However the analyzer found no bus signals because the GPIO labels (PA3, PB6, etc.) are used instead of functional names (UART_TX, SPI_MOSI). The USB D+/D- labels in the schematic are present but the analyzer has no USB bus detector. The absence of a USB bus detector means this class of interface is entirely missed across all designs using this MCU family.
